description: Top-down stealth roguelite. You are a lone agent running mission after mission through procgen complexes — extract, destroy, rescue, eliminate, hack, heist. Loot 9 weapons (pistol, shotgun, SMG, rifle, burst rifle, sniper, LMG, launcher, flamethrower) and stack mods (rapid, explosive, lifesteal, pierce, crit, ricochet, magnum, silenced, multishot, incendiary, poison, laser) to forge a run. Enemies patrol with sight cones and hearing — get spotted and the timer starts; hack a terminal to reset it. Crits become headshots, burn and poison stack, and the deeper you go the meaner they get. Single-player. Top 5 scores saved.
